scenario_description: Alice can clue rank 1 to Bob as a 1-for-1 play clue (touching y1 only). But thinking ahead, she could clue blue to Cathy, which sets up Bob to clue yellow to Cathy — a DirectPlayClue for y1 that also touches y2 and y3 as good-touch clues. The blue-to-Cathy line achieves more plays within the search horizon and should be preferred. Bob has no blue card, so blue→Bob is not a valid DirectPlayClue.
